message:
feat(glamour): Add syntect-to-lipgloss theme mapping

Implements theme conversion from syntect's GUI-oriented highlighting to
lipgloss's terminal-appropriate ANSI styles. Key additions:

- syntect_to_lipgloss(): Maps syntect Style (colors + font styles) to
  lipgloss Style with RGB colors and bold/italic/underline
- SyntaxTheme: Wrapper for syntect themes with terminal defaults
  (default_dark: base16-ocean.dark, default_light: InspiredGitHub)
- StyleCache: Performance optimization to avoid repeated conversions
- highlight_code(): Main entry point for syntax highlighting
- preview_theme(): Generate theme preview with sample code
- rgb_to_256(): Color conversion for 256-color terminals
- THEME_SET: Lazy-loaded global theme set

Includes comprehensive unit tests for all new functionality.

Closes: charmed_rust-vf3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
